scripts.commit:check: if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo 'No staged changes.'; exit 1; fi
scripts.commit:msg: { cat prompts/git-commit.txt; printf '\n\n'; git diff --cached; } | gemini | head -n 1 | tr -d '\r'
scripts.commit: pnpm run -s commit:check && MSG="$(pnpm run -s commit:msg)" && git commit -m "$MSG"
